revision.comment: +[[Category:中核市]]
[[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{popcat}} {{Commonscat|Akita, Akita}} {{Catmore}} [[Category:Cities in Akita Prefecture]] [[fi:Luokka:Akita]] [[ja:Category:秋田市]] [[ko:분류:아키타 시...'
r2.7.1) (ロボットによる 追加: [[en:Category:Akita City]]
Merging catmore1/catmore2 per [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2010 September 10|TFD]], and renaming catmore/catmore2 per [[Template talk:cat main|discussion]]
r2.7.1) (Robot: Adding [[fa:رده:آکیتا]]
r2.7.2) (ロボットによる 追加: [[fa:رده:آکیتا]]
add category using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
[[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 5 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q6807392]]
[[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 5 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q6807392]] に転記
added [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]] using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
{{subst:Cfr-speedy|Akita, Akita}}
revision.text:
<!-- BEGIN CFD TEMPLATE -->
<!-- Please do not remove or change this [[Template:Cfr-speedy]] message until the survey and discussion at [[WP:CFD]] is closed -->
{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Category| |{{error:not substituted|Cfr-speedy}}<div style="display:none;">}}
{{Cfr-speedy full|Akita, Akita|month=July|year=2014|timestamp = 20140710103502}}
<!-- End of Cfr-speedy message, feel free to edit beyond this point -->
<!-- END CFD TEMPLATE -->
{{Cat main}}
{{Commons category|Akita, Akita}}

[[Category:Cities in Akita Prefecture]]
[[Category:Wikipedia categories named after cities in Japan]]
[[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]]

revision.comment: Robot: Moved from Category:Akita City. Authors: Tsuchiya Hikaru, Addbot, Rezabot, SporkBot, Tim!, Good Olfactory, Jllm06

Robot - Moving category Wikipedia categories named after cities in Japan to [[:Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]] per [[WP:CFD|CFD]] at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2016 June 10]].
/* top */add portal using [[Project:AWB|AWB]]
Jevansen moved page [[Category:Akita, Akita]] to [[Category:Akita (city)]]: Speedily moved per [[Wikipedia:C2D|C2D]]
[[Category:1889年に成立した行政区画]]を除去; [[Category:1889年設置の日本の市町村]]を追加 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
13 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:Akita_(city)]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Copying from [[Category:Commons category link is locally defined]] to [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia40]] to [[Category:dd]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: removing these two bullshit categories
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (4 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:秋田市]] [[ar:Category:أكيتا (أكيتا)]] [[commons:Category:Akita, Akita]] [[de:Category:Akita (Akita)]] [[fa:Category:آکیتا]] [[fi:Category:Akita]] [[fr:Category:Akita]] [[ilo:Category:Akita, Akita]] [[it:Category:Akita]] [[ko:Category:아키타시]] [[mn:Category:Акита]] [[nl:Category:Akita]] [[pl:Category:Akita]] [[pt:Category:Akita (cidade)]] [[ru:Category:Акита]] [[sv:Category:Akita]] [[tg:Category:Акита]] [[tr:Category:Akita]] [[uk:Category:Акіта]] [[ur:Category:اکیتا]] [[vi:Category:Thành phố Akita]] [[zh:Category:秋田市]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:秋田市の歴史]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"
Bot: add [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
